name: INVESCO DB US DOLLAR INDEX BEARISH FUND
business: The Fund establishes short positions in DX Contracts to track the Deutsche Bank Short USD Currency Portfolio Index Excess Return. It offers Shares only to eligible financial institutions in Creation Units of 50,000 Shares. The Fund's performance is driven primarily by trading DX Contracts with the aim of seeking to track the Index.
namedSuppliers: The Bank of New York Mellon (Administrator, Custodian, Transfer Agent)

exposures.sentence: The Fund establishes short positions in certain futures contracts (the DX Contracts) with a view to tracking the changes, whether positive or negative, in the level of the Deutsche Bank Short USD Currency Portfolio Index Excess Return TM (the Index) over time.
